titleStmt.title: SII 24.544: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 544. (A.R. No. 61 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of gold by Muddirai-Rāman, son of Aḻagiyaśiṅgar belonging to the group of Śāttāda Vaishṇavas, under orders from Chinnatambi-mudaliyār, the vāśal-pradhāni of Viśvanātha-Nāyaka Chokkanātha-Nāyaka, towards offerings at the four-pillared maṇḍapa to the north of Tiruvāḻi-Āḻvān (Chakrattāḻvar) shrine. The details of the date viz. Saka 1588, Viśvāvasu, Vṛishabha śu. 7, Thursday correspond to A.D. 1665, May 11, Thursday, ·48; the nakshatra had however ended at 11 on the previous day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī‘Svasti Śrī’ has been engraved in Telugu. ḥ . śakā
bdam 1000 5 100 8 10 8 Itaṉmel cel
lāniṉṟa vicuvāvacu ṉāma samvatsarattu
viṣapa ṉāyattup pūṟuvapakṣattuc
cattamiyum kuruvāramum petta pūca
naṭcattirattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai pā
ṇṭiyakula Acaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu vi
ḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭut tiruvara
ṅkam tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅ
kaṉātatevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ
śrīvatsakotrattuc cāttāta vayiṣṇavāḷi
l Aḻakiya ciṅkar puttiraṉ muttirai rāmane
ṉ teṉṭaṉ camaṟpittup poliyūṭṭuc ci
lācāsanam paṇṇikkoṭuttapaṭi . ti
ruvāḻi Āḻvāṉ koyilukku vaṭapuṟam
Aṭiyeṉ Upaiyam ṉālukāl maṇṭapat
til ṉāḷ 1kku Amutu ceytaruḷum vaṭaippa
ruppu Arivāṇam 2kku paruppu mākāṇi 10kku
� 1(1/4) teṅkāy paḻam Arivāṇam 2kku U
2 paṭaikka caṟkarai vilai U pāṉakam kūṉ 2
kku U 2 Iḷanīr 100kku U 1 Āka ṉāḷ 1kku pu 7(1/4)8 vacanta ..
ṉ tiruṉāḷ ṉāḷt Eḻāntiruṉāḷ 10 cattāparaṇa
m ṉāḷ 8 Āka ṉāḷ 27kku poṉ 10 9 pu5 nta kkumaṇāsaṣa
kam ṉāḷ 1 kku mañcaḷ poṉ m100kku pu28 Eḻānti
ruṉāḷ vacantaṉ tiruṉāḷ 9 Āka ṉāḷ 10- kku
(kk) � poṉ 3u 8 maṇṭapam kāvaṇam poṭṭakkal
U 6(1/4) Āka poṉ 2 10 4 Intap poṉ Irupattuṉāluk
kum poliyūṭṭu viṭṭatu teṉṉūril rūpāy
(1/2) pon_ 100 6(1/4)kku poṉ 6kku U 1¥ Āka poṉ
2 10 4 Intappaṭikku Inta rūpāy ¥ m viśva
ṉāta ṉāyakkar cokkaṉāta ṉāyak
karayyaṉavarkaḷ vācalp piṟatāṉi
kkam ciṉṉattampi mutaliyāravarkaḷ
Uttāra paṭṭikku poliyūṭṭuc cilā
caāsaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumā
ḷ śrīraṅgaṉātatevar śrīpaṇṭārattu
kku muttirai rāmaṉeṉ . Intaccilācā
sanam Eḻutiṉamaikkuk koyilka
ṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻu
ttu .
